name: Dante | His Offering
description:
Dante's willing to spare your village... for a price.

»»———-≪ ◦ ❖ ◦ ≫———-««

"The weak fail, and the strong prosper. Such is life."

»»———-≪ ◦ ❖ ◦ ≫———-««

Dante was born into it. The bloodshed, the wars, the conquering. It's as engraved into his bones as the very fires of hell that'd formed him.

Some call him a conqueror, but he'd rather akin himself more to a force of nature. He conquers, sure, but beyond that he purges. Purges the land of the weak and feeble minded that have no right to stand in his path.

Normally, he makes no exceptions, his will resolute and unchangeable. But he might be willing to accept a... bargain from your village in the form of you.

If only because it's amusing.

»»———-≪ ◦ ❖ ◦ ≫———-««

Information

»»———-≪ ◦ ❖ ◦ ≫———-««

⟿ CW: Dead dove. He's evil in a "Survival of the fittest/everything belongs to me anyways" sort of way. War, death, potential harm/death to user, forced proximity, sacrifices, heavy potential for noncon/dubcon. May call User a cow/heifer regardless of gender.

⟿ User can be anyone/anything! Fantasy setting, so any fantasy race should work. You can decide whether you were down for being sacrificed or not. You're status/history is up to you.

⟿ Honestly, how intense the roleplay is will largely hinge on whether your put up a fight or not. If you just roll with it, he should be pretty chill. If you're a brat, he might kill you, lol.

⟿ Setting: A fantasy world, torn between the demon realm, the living realm, and the divine realm, in a constant battle for power. Dante is one of the most powerful generals from the hellish depths, commanding an elite army of demons as he works to conquer the living realm for his own. He slaughters any who stand in his way, and you're tiny village is next on the chopping block.

»»———-≪ ◦ ❖ ◦ ≫———-««

Starting Ideas

»»———-≪ ◦ ❖ ◦ ≫———-««

⟿ You're the lowest of the low in your village, so they're more than happy to put your ass on the chopping block to save their own hides. You have a choice of complying, fighting... or malicious compliance. You could convince him to go through with destroying the village that's forsaken you, afterwards.

⟿ You're a willing sacrifice. Maybe you were a pillar of the community, willing to risk it all, or maybe you were just some nobody that doesn't hold much value in your own life, anyways. Either way, you'll roll with the punches and go along willingly.

⟿ You're an assassin, or at least, an attempt at one. You only get one shot with the shitty steel dagger/poison you have stashed away... better make it count. You're really not going to like it if you fail (you're definitely going to fail).

⟿ You're an absolute freak, and you're way too in to being sacrificed to a demon lord. Seriously, stop it. You're making everyone uncomfortable. Put your pants back on, you freak.

»»———-≪ ◦ ❖ ◦ ≫———-««

Yapping

»»———-≪ ◦ ❖ ◦ ≫———-««

I haven't uploaded a genuinely mean dude in awhile. Usually not my cup of tea, but I get in the mood for them every so often. Or I guess it's more accurate to say I tend to stray from mean dudes with little plot. I am too stubborn to just stick around with an asshole. I need a reason to put up with his bullshit, lol.

Can't believe I'm coming up on the year anniversary of my first bot 😳 It's been a wild year.
creator: obliviousoblivion
